---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Contact — Rodrigo Hermont Ozon"
description: "Get in touch: consulting, research collaboration, teaching and speaking."
toc: false
image: "https://rhozon.github.io/portcv/assets/profile_square.jpg"
---

::: {.rh-section}
<div class="rh-kicker">Contact</div>
## Let's talk

Whether it's a consulting engagement, research collaboration, a class or a talk — the fastest way to reach me is WhatsApp or LinkedIn.

```{=html}
<div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(240px,1fr)); gap:1.1rem; margin-top:1.6rem;">
  <div class="rh-card">
    <h3>WhatsApp</h3>
    <p>Fastest response for consulting inquiries.</p>
    <a class="rh-btn rh-btn-primary" href="https://wa.me/5541988382904">Message me</a>
  </div>
  <div class="rh-card">
    <h3>LinkedIn</h3>
    <p>Professional network and updates.</p>
    <a class="rh-btn rh-btn-ghost" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/rodrigohermontozon/">Connect</a>
  </div>
  <div class="rh-card">
    <h3>E-mail</h3>
    <p>rodrigoozon@yahoo.com.br<br>
    Academic: rodrigo.hermont@pucpr.edu.br<br>
    FAE: rodrigo.ozon@fae.edu</p>
    <a class="rh-btn rh-btn-ghost" href="mailto:rodrigoozon@yahoo.com.br">Write me</a>
  </div>
  <div class="rh-card">
    <h3>Academic profiles</h3>
    <p>
      <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=hPcIR9oAAAAJ">Google Scholar</a> ·
      <a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0001-8003-4849">ORCID</a> ·
      <a href="http://lattes.cnpq.br/3532649625879285">Lattes</a> ·
      <a href="https://github.com/rhozon">GitHub</a>
    </p>
  </div>
</div>
```
:::
